scripts.webpack:dev: npm run clean && devkit-service serve --bundler webpack --mode development
scripts.webpack:prod: npm run clean && devkit-service build --bundler webpack --mode production
scripts.vite:dev: npm run clean && devkit-service serve --bundler vite --mode development
scripts.vite:prod: npm run clean && devkit-service build --bundler vite --mode production
scripts.rspack:dev: npm run clean && devkit-service serve --bundler rspack --mode development
scripts.rspack:prod: npm run clean && devkit-service build --bundler rspack --mode production
scripts.rollup:dev: npm run clean && devkit-service serve --bundler rollup --mode development
scripts.rollup:prod: npm run clean && devkit-service build --bundler rollup --mode production
